description: Claw session metadata in ring storage (turns/events live in the session DynamoDB table via SessionController; this row only tracks pointers and custom meta keyed by session_id)

fields.hint: Canonical session key: entity_type|entity_id|thread_id (see format_session_key in Sessions)
fields.label: Session id
fields.name: session_id

fields.hint: Opaque JSON: at minimum active_turn_id after create_turn; merge patches from update_session_metadata
fields.label: Metadata
fields.name: metadata

label: Claw session metadata
name: claw_sessions
